  • Third Alt - New!

── .✦ Gia has a crush on you and just discovered a surprising truth; you were a new junior, a dedicated student council member, and a shining academic star. It was a stark contrast to her rebellious presence.

Your diligent study habits and early-bird tendencies made it difficult for her to catch you off guard. The only places where you crossed paths were the cafeteria. And the library. That's it. Or whatever the heck place that she found you all alone.

You had heard rumors about her, but you never imagined that you were the subject of her attention.

Over time, your paths began to cross more frequently. It wasn't a friendship or anything; it was simply you lecturing her on her mischievous behavior.

☆ Gia falls in love with ya at the first sight
